last_completed_item: D-194 — Optional shared-room entry with local room instances and coarse confirmation
current_item: D-195 — Shared room completion across local instances
next_action: Ask exactly one concise A/B/C decision card selecting how durable room completion, doors, and rewards settle when players may either join a teammate's active room instance or enter their own local instance: the first valid instance clear marks the room globally complete; every participating active player's local instance must clear before global completion; or a hybrid where personal instances and ordinary loot resolve separately while coarse shared map progress unlocks after one valid clear and players still fighting may finish or withdraw. Preserve local authority for movement, firing, incoming damage, pickups, loot, and immediate feedback; coarse shared confirmation for room identity, doors, completion, map access, teleports, and major rewards; optional joined or personal room entry; personal non-replenishable lives and spectator clutch play; active-player-count scaling locked per instance at entry; separate personal progression; relay-backed latency-tolerant networking; and deferred deep shared team objectives. Include pacing, griefing, split-party deadlock, farming, banking and unsecured loot, respawn and teleport behavior, disconnected or spectating players, synchronization complexity, and future deeper co-op objectives. Put the recommendation after all A/B/C options at the end of the card. D-191 through D-194 were persisted early for handoff safety; queue D-195 through D-200 and persist at D-200 unless the user changes the batching rule or requests another handoff.
